query_normalized: self-improving llm: recursive architecture refinement and re-training computer science
rationale: The paper studies a re‑training / fine‑tuning technique (Alignment Fine‑Tuning) that improves LLM reasoning performance, directly addressing a self‑improvement loop for LLMs. This satisfies criterion (b): it measures a dependent variable (reasoning ability) after a re‑training method within the same domain of LLM improvement.
